articles.title: Adani gets to schedule a hearing in SEC case, Group stocks surge
articles.description: Adani Group stocks surged as Gautam Adani sought dismissal of a US SEC civil fraud case. Adani Green Energy led gains, jumping 12%. A US court granted Adani's request to schedule a hearing on his plea to dismiss the case, citing lack of personal jurisdiction and failure to state a claim.

articles.title: TCS likely to log highest revenue growth in 9 quarters on weaker rupee
articles.description: Tata Consultancy Services is poised to report a 4% sequential revenue growth for the March quarter, its highest in nine quarters, largely driven by rupee depreciation. Despite a negative investor sentiment towards the IT sector due to AI advancements and geopolitical tensions, TCS's dollar revenue is expected to see a five-quarter high growth.

articles.title: Ceasefire calm sparks bargain hunting in beaten-down stocks
articles.description: Following a US-Iran ceasefire, bargain hunters are cautiously investing in stocks heavily impacted by the West Asia sell-off. Sectors like aviation, travel, and oil marketing companies saw sharp rebounds, though analysts debate the sustainability of this recovery. Stronger investor interest is noted in quality large-cap stocks in banking, pharmaceuticals, and FMCG, which were less directly affected by the conflict.

articles.title: Investors not quite sure markets have passed the Strait of Hormuz

articles.description: Adani Group stocks surged as Gautam Adani sought dismissal of a US SEC civil fraud case. Adani Green Energy led gains, jumping 12%. A US court granted Adani's request to schedule a hearing on his plea to dismiss the case, citing lack of personal jurisdiction and failure to state a claim.

articles.title: US court allows pre-motion hearing in SEC case against Adani Group
articles.description: The Adanis argued that the US court lacks jurisdiction and that the complaint fails to establish any wrongdoing.

articles.title: Govt may seek RBI move to relax NPA norms to cushion MSMEs from war impact
articles.description: Small-business borrowers have increasingly approached lenders seeking relief measures, citing business disruptions from the West Asia war. Officials of the RBI, MSME and finance ministries and industry groups met on Wednesday to discuss the situation.

articles.title: India orders upgrades by 2027 to shield aircraft from 5G, 6G signal risk
articles.description: DGCA has asked all airlines to modify radio altimeters, a cockpit tool to measure altitude of an aircraft, so that they are tolerant to 3,300-3,670MHz C-band of 5G services by 31 December 2027.

articles.title: Rain check: Your guide to protecting the gut from seasonal infections - The Indian Express
articles.description: Rain check: Your guide to protecting the gut from seasonal infections  The Indian Express

articles.title: 'Netanyahu's contempt for international law intolerable,' says Spanish PM Sanchez amid Lebanon attacks
articles.description: Sanchez said that Netanyahu's ‘contempt for life and international law is intolerable’ and also demanded to include Lebanon in the ceasefire deal between US and Iran and urged the international community to condemn the violation of international law by the Israeli PM.

articles.title: How Mysore laid roots for a level playing field
articles.description: India will celebrate Ambedkar's 135th birthday on April 14, honoring his fight for Dalit rights and the inclusion of reservation policies in the Constitution.

articles.title: TCS likely to log highest revenue growth in 9 quarters on weaker rupee
articles.description: Tata Consultancy Services is poised to report a 4% sequential revenue growth for the March quarter, its highest in nine quarters, largely driven by rupee depreciation. Despite a negative investor sentiment towards the IT sector due to AI advancements and geopolitical tensions, TCS's dollar revenue is expected to see a five-quarter high growth.

topStories.title: US Iran War Live: Ceasefire threatened as Israel strikes Lebanon; Tehran announces alternative routes in Hormuz Strait
topStories.description: US Iran war Live Updates: US President Donald Trump stated that the United States would collaborate with Iran to extract deeply buried enriched uranium, a claim that Tehran has not verified. Get latest updates on Iran US war here on Mint!

topStories.description: Sanchez said that Netanyahu's ‘contempt for life and international law is intolerable’ and also demanded to include Lebanon in the ceasefire deal between US and Iran and urged the international community to condemn the violation of international law by the Israeli PM.

A US court granted Adani's request to schedule a hearing on his plea to dismiss the case, citing lack of personal jurisdiction and failure to state a claim.

topStories.title: Ceasefire calm sparks bargain hunting in beaten-down stocks
topStories.description: Following a US-Iran ceasefire, bargain hunters are cautiously investing in stocks heavily impacted by the West Asia sell-off. Sectors like aviation, travel, and oil marketing companies saw sharp rebounds, though analysts debate the sustainability of this recovery. Stronger investor interest is noted in quality large-cap stocks in banking, pharmaceuticals, and FMCG, which were less directly affected by the conflict.

topStories.title: ‘Big, poorly run, piece of ice’: Trump invokes Greenland as he mulls punishing NATO over lack of Iran war support
topStories.description: Trump weighs punishing NATO allies over Iran war, mulling troop withdrawals from Spain and Germany as he invokes Greenland in a fresh assault on the transatlantic alliance.

topStories.title: Investors not quite sure markets have passed the Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: Markets are cautiously optimistic after a US-Iran ceasefire. Investors are watching fourth-quarter earnings and crude oil prices closely. Foreign institutional investors' decisions will also shape market direction. While immediate conflict fears fade, domestic concerns like valuations and growth recovery may resurface. Corporate profitability faces pressure from higher energy costs and a weaker rupee.

topStories.description: Trump has been a longtime critic of NATO and in his first term had suggested he had the authority on his own to leave the alliance.

topStories.description: A legal order seeking the golfer's medications - including dosage and warnings about driving on pill bottles - will be issued later this month, court record shows.

dailyNews.title: Jimmy Kimmel tells UCLA women's basketball team to give Trump fake national championship trophy
dailyNews.description: Jimmy Kimmel urged UCLA's national champion women's basketball team to give President Donald Trump a fake trophy at the White House during a late night segment.

dailyNews.title: White House fires back at George Clooney after actor accuses Trump of threatening a war crime
dailyNews.description: George Clooney blasts Trump's threat to end a civilization as a potential war crime. The White House responds by mocking Clooney's movies and acting.

dailyNews.title: Democratic lawmaker warns he's 'taking names,' creating list of people who need to be held accountable
dailyNews.description: Rep. Jason Crow said Tuesday that Democrats are "taking names" in response to a reported Trump DOJ "enemies" list, vowing to seek accountability against the administration.

dailyNews.title: Has Trump Met His War Goals in Iran?
dailyNews.description: On the first day of the pause, Iran fired missiles and launched drones in the region. It said an oil refinery on Lavan Island had been attacked. Israel continued its strikes in Lebanon.

dailyNews.title: White House Knew About Pakistan’s Cease-Fire Post on X Before It Was Sent
dailyNews.description: Pakistan’s prime minister posted a public plea on X for President Trump to extend his Tuesday evening deadline for Iran. The White House was directly involved in shaping the message.

dailyNews.title: White House Secures Foreign Steel for Trump’s Ballroom Project
dailyNews.description: ArcelorMittal, a European steel maker, is donating tens of millions of dollars of foreign steel for President Trump’s new ballroom.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Investigating L.A. Schools’ Gender Disclosure Policies
dailyNews.description: The investigation into the nation’s second-largest school district was prompted by a lawsuit from parents who say the policies contributed to their child’s death.

dailyNews.title: On Truth Social, Trump Supporters Fume About Iran War
dailyNews.description: A growing chorus of disaffected Trump supporters is sounding off in the replies to his posts on the social media platform he founded.
